Slide 3 — Clarea introduction
La Mundial

Clarea

"Escape the ordinary, enjoy a frenzy of freshness"
Wine-based sparkling with peach notes, fine bubbles and golden colour. Crafted from locally grown Barcelona grapes with exotic spices. Serve extra cold with lemon.
Peachy notes · exotic spices · fine bubbles
Locally grown grapes · Barcelona province
Radically different — new category
